caption: A young man wearing a pink tank top and black shorts is practicing basketball in an indoor gym with a blue and tan court, blue bleachers, and a basketball hoop. He begins by shooting a basketball toward the hoop, with the ball visible in mid-air. As the sequence progresses, he watches the ball and then moves toward the camera. He eventually recovers the basketball, holding it in his right hand as he walks forward. The gym is spacious and empty of other people, featuring white walls and a high ceiling. The transition across the frames shows the arc of the basketball and the player's movement from the perimeter of the court toward the foreground. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
